heading: Type Parameters of Any Type
body:
The following classes accept all type parameters:

- [FindCursor](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/FindCursor.html)

- [AggregationCursor](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/AggregationCursor.html)

You can find a code snippet that shows how to specify a type for the `FindCursor`
class in the [find() Example: Full File](node-driver-find-usage-example-code-snippet) section of the [Find Documents](node-find)
guide.
